old: PAX5 deacetylation at K198 was necessary for B cell development in Sirt7−/− pro-B cells transplanted into sublethally irradiated mice.
new: PAX5 deacetylation at K198 rescued defective B cell development in Sirt7−/− pro-B cells transplanted into sublethally irradiated mice.

old: In Sirt7−/− pro-B cells transplanted into sublethally irradiated mice, restoring Pax5 deacetylation restricted lineage plasticity by repressing lineage-inappropriate genes.
new: In Sirt7−/− pro-B cells transplanted into sublethally irradiated mice, Pax5 deacetylation was necessary to restrict lineage plasticity.
